name: Maryland Crab Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Fry the bacon and add it to a large pot.
2. Brown the stew meat in the bacon grease and add it to the pot along with the vegetables.
3. Add the remaining vegetables: bring to a boil and simmer for 1 hour or until the stew meat is done.
4. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
5. Clean the crabs by removing the top shell and lungs (devil).
6. Break the crabs in half and add them to the pot along with Old Bay seasoning.
7. Boil slowly for a longer period of time, ideally for at least half an hour, until the soup tastes better.
